audit_policy.cost_note: Audit students pay the same tuition and fees as credit students. SC residents aged 60+ may have tuition waived under SC Code § 59-111-320; fees still apply.

senior_discount.notes: SC residents 60+ may attend classes at any public technical college with tuition waived, space permitting, under SC Code § 59-111-320.

steps: Complete an admissions application
Register for the course through the normal registration process
Request audit status before the add/drop deadline
application_process.timing: Audit requests must be submitted before the add/drop deadline

restrictions: Instructor approval may be required
Audit students receive a grade of AU — no credit or grade points awarded
Financial aid does not cover audited courses
Audit seats are subject to availability — credit-seeking students get priority
